summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of Felix BRVM heatmap app on mobile viewport (430x900). All 37 UI checks passed across Heatmap, StockDetail, Watchlist, Portfolio, and Settings pages. No backend testing per request.

issues: In post-navigation screenshot the 'Réglages' label appeared to retain mint tint briefly — likely a screenshot-timing artifact of the tab-pop animation. Functional navigation and active-state routing verified working; not a blocker.

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding React Router v7 future flags (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) to silence console warnings.
Portfolio: `totalPct = (totalPl / totalCost) * 100` — will divide-by-zero if totalCost is 0. Not triggered by current mock data but worth guarding.
StockDetail: `getStockByTicker` is called every render; fine for now but could be memoized if data grows.
seed_data_creation: None - mock data lives in /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js as intended.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is frontend-only, mobile-first, French. Use viewport 430x900. All interactive elements have proper data-testid. Preview URL: https://0e8e0885-3a8a-4434-804a-da7085ba23fe.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified flows: sector rows (all 7), 26 heatmap cells, dropdown-period & dropdown-index open/select, btn-refresh spin, navigation to /stock/SNTS, btn-back/btn-star/btn-buy/btn-sell present, star fill toggles to #00D084, bottom-tab-bar hidden on /stock/*, all 4 tabs navigate correctly, Watchlist empty state with btn-add-watchlist, Portfolio holdings SNTS/SGBC/PALC + portfolio-total-change, Settings rows (notifications/currency/language/about) + Felix branding. Body bg is rgb(0,0,0) confirmed.
